hero.subtitle: Ventiqo uses AI to generate complete, structured business plans section by section. Professional results, zero consultant fees.
hero.trial_note: 30-day free trial · No credit card required

problem.subtitle: Traditional business planning is slow, expensive, and generic. There has to be a better way.
problem.p1_desc: Writing a complete business plan manually takes weeks of research, writing, and formatting.
problem.p2_desc: Hiring a business consultant to write your plan can cost thousands of dollars.
problem.p3_desc: Generic templates don't understand your industry, market, or specific business context.

how.subtitle: From company setup to finished PDF — the entire process is guided, fast, and intelligent.
how.step1_desc: Set up your company profile with your industry, location, team, and products. Takes less than 2 minutes.
how.step2_desc: Fill in guided forms for each section. Our AI generates professional content based on your real data — no fictional information.
how.step3_desc: Download a polished PDF in your preferred template. Edit any section at any time and regenerate as needed.

features.subtitle: A complete toolkit for generating, editing, and exporting professional business plans.
features.ai_sections_desc: From Executive Summary to Appendices — every section of a professional business plan, generated by AI.
features.bilingual_desc: Generate your entire business plan in English or French, including all headings and content.
features.bmc_desc: Automatically extracted from your plan and displayed in the standard BMC format, ready to export.
features.charts_desc: Revenue projections, cost breakdowns, and profit growth visualized as interactive charts.
features.edit_desc: Not happy with a section? Edit it manually or regenerate it with the AI at any time.
features.export_desc: Download your business plan as a professional PDF in multiple visual templates.

preview.subtitle: A clean, professional result page with your full plan, financial charts, and export options.

pricing.subtitle: Start with a 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.trial_note: All plans include a 30-day free trial. No credit card required.
pricing.starter_desc: Perfect for solo entrepreneurs and early-stage startups.
pricing.pro_desc: For growing businesses that need more power and flexibility.
pricing.enterprise_desc: For agencies and consultants managing multiple clients.

cta.subtitle: Join Ventiqo today and generate your first complete business plan in minutes.

bp.section_completed: This section has been generated successfully.

bp.product_description_placeholder: Product description will auto-fill, or type manually

descriptions.company_presentation: Describe your company, mission, vision and products.
descriptions.market_analysis: Analyze your target market, competitors and trends.
descriptions.org_management: Define your team structure and governance.
descriptions.strategy: Outline your commercial, marketing and development strategy.
descriptions.operational_plan: Detail your operations, infrastructure and hiring plan.
descriptions.financial_plan: Provide your financial projections and funding sources.
descriptions.risk_opportunity: Identify risks and opportunities for your business.

placeholders.legal_form: What is your legal structure? e.g. LLC, SARL, SAS, Sole Trader
placeholders.industry: What sector do you operate in? e.g. Software, Retail, Food & Beverage
placeholders.mission: What problem do you solve and for who? e.g. We help small shops manage their stock easily
placeholders.vision: Where do you want to be in 5-10 years?
placeholders.history: How did the company start and grow?
placeholders.products_summary: What do you sell or offer?
placeholders.target_market: Who are your customers? e.g. Small shops and retail businesses
placeholders.target_customer: Describe your ideal customer. e.g. A shop owner aged 25-45 with no technical background
placeholders.market_trends: What is changing in your market? e.g. More businesses are moving to digital tools post-COVID
placeholders.demand_drivers: Why are customers looking for your solution now? e.g. Rising costs of manual errors and paper-based systems
placeholders.supply_constraints: What makes it hard to serve the market? e.g. Limited internet access in rural areas
placeholders.management_team: Who runs the company day to day? e.g. CEO handles strategy, CTO manages the tech team
placeholders.governance_model: How are decisions made in the company? e.g. Weekly leadership meetings, founders have equal voting rights
placeholders.org_structure: How is the team organized? e.g. 3 departments: Tech, Sales, and Customer Support
placeholders.key_departments: What are your main teams? e.g. Engineering, Marketing, Finance
placeholders.advisory_board: Do you have any mentors or external advisors? e.g. 2 advisors — one in finance, one in marketing
placeholders.commercial_strategy: How do you plan to grow your sales? e.g. Start locally then expand to neighboring countries
placeholders.sales_channels: How do customers buy from you? e.g. Our website, direct calls, and local resellers
placeholders.revenue_streams: How does the company make money? e.g. Monthly subscriptions and one-time setup fees
placeholders.pricing_model: How much do you charge? e.g. Three plans: Basic $29/mo, Pro $59/mo, Business $99/mo
placeholders.marketing_approach: How do you reach new customers? e.g. Social media, word of mouth, and Google ads
placeholders.brand_positioning: How do you want customers to see your brand? e.g. Affordable and easy to use — made for local businesses
placeholders.acquisition_channels: Where do your leads come from? e.g. Instagram ads, referrals, local business events
placeholders.dev_roadmap: What features or improvements are planned? e.g. Mobile app in Q1, payment integration in Q2
placeholders.rd_plans: Any research or innovation projects? e.g. Working on an AI feature to predict low stock automatically
placeholders.product_milestones: What are your key product launch dates? e.g. Beta launched Jan 2024, full version launching Q3 2024
placeholders.production_process: How do you build or deliver your product? e.g. We release updates every two weeks using agile sprints
placeholders.infrastructure: What tools or systems keep the business running? e.g. Hosted on AWS, automated backups every day
placeholders.logistics: How do you deliver your product or service? e.g. Everything is online — clients get access instantly after payment
placeholders.hiring_plan: Who do you plan to hire and when? e.g. 2 developers and 1 sales rep in the first quarter
placeholders.calendar: What are your key milestones for the next 12 months? e.g. Jan: launch, Apr: reach 50 clients, Jul: break even
placeholders.operational_kpis: How will you measure success? e.g. Monthly revenue, number of active clients, customer support response time
placeholders.startup_costs: How much do you need to get started? e.g. $30,000 for servers, legal fees, and 3 months of salaries
placeholders.monthly_burn: How much does the company spend per month? e.g. Around $8,000 per month including salaries and tools
placeholders.breakeven: When will the business cover its own costs? e.g. We expect to break even around month 14 with 80 clients
placeholders.revenue_y1: How much do you expect to earn in year 1? e.g. $60,000 from 50 paying clients
placeholders.revenue_y2: How much do you expect to earn in year 2? e.g. $180,000 after expanding the team and adding new features
placeholders.revenue_y3: How much do you expect to earn in year 3? e.g. $420,000 after entering new markets
placeholders.funding_sources: Where is the money coming from? e.g. $50K from founders and $100K from an angel investor
placeholders.financial_assumptions: What assumptions did you base your numbers on? e.g. 5% monthly churn, 15% growth in new clients per month
placeholders.internal_risks: What could go wrong inside the company? e.g. Losing a key team member or slow product development
placeholders.external_risks: What outside factors could hurt the business? e.g. A bigger competitor entering the market or economic downturn
placeholders.mitigation_plans: How will you handle those risks? e.g. Cross-train the team and keep 3 months of cash in reserve
placeholders.opportunities: What opportunities could help you grow faster? e.g. Government grants for digital transformation projects
placeholders.contingency: What is your backup plan if things don't go as planned? e.g. Offer consulting services to generate revenue while we adjust
placeholders.appendix_docs: What supporting documents are you including? e.g. Financial spreadsheet, product demo screenshots
placeholders.references: Any reports or data sources you used? e.g. World Bank SME report 2023, Statista MENA data
placeholders.market_links: Any useful links about your market? e.g. https://statista.com/mena-saas-2024
